summary: Iteration 22 testing completed: All 16 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: ExpensesPage rewrite with 3 tabs (Bursary/Training/Standalone), filters (search, status, date, amount), requested_amount display, Submit Expense dialog with application selector, Users router (GET /users, GET /users/me, POST /users/batch-action), available-applications endpoint, application-expenses endpoint with requested_amount.

issues: Missing `aria-describedby` warning in console for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement

tabs.bursary_application: PASS - Shows filters, stats cards (Requested Amount, Total Expenses), Grand Total row
tabs.training_application: PASS - Shows filters, stats cards, Grand Total row with R12,000 requested, R4,500 expenses
tabs.standalone_expenses: PASS - Shows search, status, category, date filters

filters.bursary_tab: PASS - Search, Status, DateFrom/To, AmountMin/Max all present
filters.training_tab: PASS - Search, Status, DateFrom/To, AmountMin/Max all present
filters.standalone_tab: PASS - Search, Status, Category, DateFrom/To all present

submit_expense_dialog.expense_fields: PASS - Flights, Accommodation, Car Hire, Catering with notes

stats_cards.total_expenses: PASS - Shows sum of all expenses

users_router.get_users: PASS - Returns user list without password_hash

training_applications_page.status_banner: PASS - Shows 'Training applications are open — Deadline: 12/31/2026'
training_applications_page.admin_controls: PASS - Edit, Delete, Change Status, Edit Expenses buttons visible
training_applications_page.employee_restrictions: PASS - Employee sees no Period Settings, no checkboxes

employee_visibility_restrictions.available_applications: PASS - Employee sees only own applications
employee_visibility_restrictions.application_expenses: PASS - Employee sees only own expenses

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending real emails

seed_data_creation: Test bursary and training applications created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 22 features verified working: 1) ExpensesPage completely rewritten with 3 tabs (Bursary Application, Training Application, Standalone Expenses), 2) Each tab has comprehensive filters (search, status, date from/to, amount min/max), 3) Submit Expense dialog allows selecting from available applications (non-draft status) and submitting expenses for flights/accommodation/car hire/catering, 4) requested_amount field now included in application-expenses endpoint response, 5) GET /api/expenses/available-applications returns all non-draft apps with type, requested_amount, has_expenses, 6) Users router (/api/users, /api/users/me, /api/users/batch-action) working correctly in routers/users.py, 7) Training Applications page still has Period Settings, batch delete, admin controls - all correctly hidden for employees.
